pages.text:
TE Connectivity Raychem Heat-shrinkable Medium Wall Halogen-free Insulation Tubing MWTM
Material properties Test method Material requirements
Tensile strength ISO 37 14 MPa min.
Ultimate elongation ISO 37 350 % min.
Density ISO 1183 Method A 0.9 – 1.1 g/cm3
Hardness ISO 868 50 shore D
Accelerated ageing 7 days at 150°C ±2°C ISO 188
Tensile strength ISO 37 14 MPa min.
Ultimate elongation ISO 37 300 % min.
Thermal endurance* IEC 60216 120°C min.
Low temperature 4 hrs at -40°C ±3°C ASTM D 2671 No cracking
flexibility Procedure C
Dielectric strength 1 mm wall IEC 60243 200 kV/cm
Volume resistivity IEC 60093 1 x 1012Ωcm min.
Water absorption ISO 62 Method 1 0.25 % max after 14 days at 23°C±2°C
Resistance to liquids 7 days in transformer ISO 1817
oil VDE 0370 at 23°C ±2°C
Tensile strength ISO 37 14 MPa min.
Ultimate elongation ISO 37 300 % min.
Weathering The material from which MWTM is manufactured contains
carbon black to protect it from ultra-violet light.
Additional properties Further details are given in Raychem
specification PPS 3010/19 (A) [1326].
* based on ultimate elongation
